
### exercise: control hazard timing+forwarding? 

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq,addq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

* with F/D/E/M/W: what is fetched when? what is forwarded?
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1.figure.svg)


### [solution]: control hazard timing+forwarding? 

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq,addq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

* with F/D/E/M/W: what is fetched when? what is forwarded?
 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}


:::


### againframe(sameHazEx1Soln)

### exercise: with different pipeline 

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq,addq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

* with F/D/E1/E2/M/W
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/diffHazEx2.figure.svg)


### [solution]: with different pipeline 

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq,addq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

* with F/D/E1/E2/M/W
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/diffHazEx2Soln.figure.svg)
